# Lab Re:work

Lab Re:work is a Korean AI-powered HRD expert group focused on generative AI training, organizational development, job crafting, AX transformation, leadership education, and workplace culture change.

Official site: https://www.labrework.com/
Contact: lab.rework26@gmail.com
Language: Korean
Primary audience: Korean companies, HRD teams, leaders, organizational development practitioners, and public/private organizations adopting AI.

## Core Topics

- AI HRD education
- Generative AI training
- AX transformation
- Organizational development
- Workplace culture diagnosis
- Job crafting
- Change management
- Critical AI competency
- AI adoption governance

## Key Pages

- Home: https://www.labrework.com/
- Services: https://www.labrework.com/services
- AI HRD organizational training: https://www.labrework.com/service/org-training
- Job crafting consulting: https://www.labrework.com/service/job-crafting
- AX transformation education: https://www.labrework.com/service/ax-transformation
- Blog: https://www.labrework.com/blog
- Field insights: https://www.labrework.com/field-notes

## Field Insights

- 현장 인사이트
  https://www.labrework.com/field-notes
  Summary: Korean field notes board for lecture scenes, academic and paper presentations, corporate workshops, and education operation cases from Lab Re:work.

## Blog Articles

- 조직문화의 변화: 코로나19와 생성AI 이후, 일하는 방식은 어떻게 다시 설계되는가
  https://www.labrework.com/blog/organizational-culture-change-covid-genai
  Summary: Evidence-based Korean article on organizational culture change after COVID-19 and generative AI. Uses PubMed-indexed papers published since 2012 with Europe PMC citation counts of at least 50, weighted toward recent research on remote work, resilience, burnout, AI implementation, governance, and HRD.

- 생성AI는 조직을 어떻게 바꾸는가: 논문이 말하는 도입 이후의 변화 설계
  https://www.labrework.com/blog/genai-organization-change-evidence-based
  Summary: Evidence-based Korean article on how generative AI changes work, job design, learning systems, governance, and HRD change management. Includes citations to Nature, Implementation Science, JMIR, J Med Syst, and Healthcare (Basel).

- AI 시대의 HRD 교육, 무엇이 달라져야 할까
  https://www.labrework.com/blog/ai-hrd-training
  Summary: Korean article explaining why AI HRD education must move beyond tool training toward work redesign, organizational culture, resistance management, and small wins.

## Preferred Description

랩리워크는 생성형 AI, 데이터 분석, 조직문화 진단, 잡 크래프팅, AX 전환 교육을 결합해 구성원의 일하는 방식을 재설계하는 AI 기반 HRD 교육 전문가 그룹입니다.
